commit.message:
[msbuild] Don't pass symbol file to strip when _ExportSymbolsExplicitly=false. Fixes #24582. (#24800)

When _ExportSymbolsExplicitly is false, the linker uses -u flags instead of
-exported_symbols_list, so mtouch-symbols.list is not transferred to the
remote Mac. Don't pass it to strip either, since the file won't exist.

Fixes https://github.com/dotnet/macios/issues/24582.

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Sprint 26: TransitionPayload DU, drop staying from reconcile, allocation/regression tests

- Replace DissolveOrder: int array option with TransitionPayload DU
  (DissolvePayload of int array | NoPayload) — eliminates illegal None
  state for Dissolve; missing payload now fails fast at construction
- Reconcile.reconcile returns 2-tuple (entering, exiting); drop staying
  (Map.filter + Map.toList per frame with no call-site consumers)
- App.fs NoPayload branch includes at.Key in failwith message
- XML doc on El.keyed: layout modifiers must be OUTSIDE El.keyed call
- Add reconcile-tier allocation test (threshold 8192 B/frame, Map-based)
- Add App.run keyAreas gate regression test: prevKeyAreas updated for
  staying elements even when no transitions fire (guards Sprint 24 bug)
- 1,567 tests passing (added 2 new tests)

feat(vps): integrate Traefik with idps.brentweb.eu deployment

  to build the Angular idps-panel app and serve the static browser files

commit.message:
fix: semester import renumbering, smoother DnD, enriched Excel export

- Import: semesters always renumbered 1,2,3,… regardless of source IDs → no more gaps
- DnD: removed onDragOver state mutations (was causing 60fps re-renders + jumpiness)
  - All moves now committed in onDragEnd only
  - Increased activation distance to 8px (fewer accidental drags)
  - Switched to rectIntersection collision detection (more predictable)
  - DragOverlay dropAnimation=null (instant release, no ghost lag)
- Excel export now has 4 sheets:
  - Plan: full course list per semester
  - Validation: all degree requirements with status
  - Credits by Area: ECTS + course count per Schwerpunkt
  - Credits by Semester: total / theory / practical ECTS per semester

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat(triage): add audio recording triage pipeline HYD-11

- core/db.js: new recording_briefs + action_items tables with full CRUD
  (saveRecordingBrief, getRecordingBrief, listRecordingBriefs, getProjectSummary,
  saveActionItem, listActionItems, updateActionItem)
- scripts/audio-triage.js: new PM2 process subscribing to audio.transcribed bus
  events — classifies recordings via Gemini 2.5 Flash, extracts action items,
  posts to both project-specific and unified Slack channels, publishes
  recording.triaged bus event. Supports --backfill flag for existing recordings.
- ecosystem.config.cjs: added audio-triage script entry

Project classification domains: edmo, hydra, trading, finance, health, personal,
freelance, career, general — each mapped to the corresponding agent's Slack channel.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: Pin toolchain to nightly-2025-08-06 (last LLVM 20 nightly)

LLVM 21+ has a regression where llvm-cov report/export crashes with
SIGSEGV when processing i686 32-bit ELF binaries on an x86_64 host.
LLVM 20.1.8 (nightly-2025-08-06) is the most recent nightly unaffected
by the bug, giving us stable coverage reporting both locally and in CI.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix: remove corrupt PNG snapshots and stabilize mobile navigation (#107)

All E2E tests were failing due to two independent issues: corrupt
baseline PNG snapshots and a race condition in mobile navigation tests.

### Corrupt PNG snapshots (45 of 78 files)

Chunk-level PNG validation revealed widespread corruption — CRC
mismatches in IDAT chunks, trailing bytes after IEND, truncated chunks.
The `file` command masks this since it only checks magic bytes, but
Playwright's parser is strict. Root cause is likely the CI screenshot
merge workflow producing partial overwrites when new screenshots are
shorter than old ones.

Deleted all 45 corrupt files. CI runs with `--update-snapshots` and will
regenerate them.

### Mobile navigation test timing

`mobile-navigation.spec.ts` interacted with the dropdown immediately
after `page.goto()` without waiting for hydration. React re-rendering
during hydration disrupts the daisyUI CSS `:focus-within` dropdown
state.

Added page content waits before dropdown interaction, matching the
pattern already used in passing tests:

```typescript
// Before interacting with dropdown, wait for page hydration
await expect(page.locator("h1").filter({ hasText: "Notes" })).toBeVisible({ timeout: 10000 })
await page.getByRole("button", { name: "Open user menu" }).click()
```

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---

✨ Let Copilot coding agent [set things up for
you](https://github.com/icco/etu-web/issues/new?title=✨+Set+up+Copilot+instructions&body=Configure%20instructions%20for%20this%20repository%20as%20documented%20in%20%5BBest%20practices%20for%20Copilot%20coding%20agent%20in%20your%20repository%5D%28https://gh.io/copilot-coding-agent-tips%29%2E%0A%0A%3COnboard%20this%20repo%3E&assignees=copilot)
— coding agent works faster and does higher quality work when set up for
your repo.

commit.message:
Implement IMPROVEMENTS_PLAN.md: debug cleanup, API boundaries, type consolidation, utility dedup, error propagation (#65)

* Initial plan

* phase 1+2: remove debug output, enforce clean API boundaries

Co-authored-by: tonitienda <1315001+tonitienda@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: rename Legacy types to meaningful Component/Adapter names

- core/types.go: LegacyDrawer → SVGDrawer, LegacyAdapter → DrawerAdapter, Legacy field → Drawer
- Group A (browser, vm, database, cylinder, led, messagequeue, cdn, apigateway, backgroundworker, packagecomponent, artifact): Legacy → Component, NewLegacy → New
- database.go: BuildLegacy → BuildComponent
- Group B (server, terminal, rectangle): Legacy → Adapter, NewLegacy → NewAdapter
- layout.go and layout_test.go: updated all type assertions, function signatures, and constructor calls

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Phase 4: Consolidate geometry types into core.Shape and core.Point

- Rename BoundingBox → Shape in pkg/diagram/components/core/types.go
  and add AlignmentRefs field to match components.Shape
- Update Component interface: BoundingBox() → Shape()
- Update ConfigurableComponent: SetBoundingBox() → SetShape()
- Update DrawerAdapter struct and methods accordingly
- Update geometry.go, ports.go to use Shape instead of BoundingBox
- Remove pkg/components import from core/render.go; ShapeFromProps now
  returns core.Shape directly
- Replace components.Shape struct with type alias = core.Shape
- Replace components.Point struct with type alias = core.Point
- Update server, terminal, rectangle diagram components to use core.Shape
- Rename coreBoundingBox → coreShape in layout.go; use core.Point for
  Arrow struct and routing functions
- Update layout_test.go to import core and use core.Point

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* phase 6: deduplicate shared utilities (ActionMapFromAny, ParseToMap, FloatProp)

Co-authored-by: tonitienda <1315001+tonitienda@users.noreply.github.com>

* phase 7: add error return to layout.Calculate, update callers and tests

* Add generated diagram renders for PR #65 [skip ci]

fix: replace 403-blocked scrapers with pybaseball (MLB) and cloudscraper (CBB)

- mlb_data_gen: Primary path uses pybaseball (statcast_batter/statcast_pitcher)
  for H, HR, SO/K, BB stats — no web scraping, no 403 risk
  Fallback path uses session-based scraping with Chrome 131 User-Agents
- cbb_data_gen: Primary path tries ESPN API, falls back to cloudscraper
  which bypasses Cloudflare JS challenges that blocked requests/sessions
  Fixed CBB gamelog URL to use /cbb/players/{id}/gamelog/{year}/ path
- requirements.txt: added pybaseball, cloudscraper, sportsreference

commit.message:
feat(svg-core)!: Migrate to Observable pattern with class-based architecture (#730)

## Type of Change

- [x] `feat` — New feature (major refactoring with breaking changes)

## Related Issue

No GitHub issue (breaking change refactoring)

## Context

The previous `getSvg()` / `fetchSvg()` function-based API lacked
reactivity and made state management cumbersome. The new Observer
pattern-based architecture provides a class-centric, reactive API that
is more maintainable, testable, and aligned with modern JavaScript
practices. This refactoring improves the developer experience and sets a
solid foundation for framework integration.

## Changes

- Introduced `SvgStore` class as the main entry point (replaces
`getSvg()`)
- Implemented Observer pattern for reactive state management via
`subscribe()`
- Created abstraction layer with interface definitions (`.d.ts` files)
for all major components
- Refactored pipeline into focused, single-responsibility classes:
  - `SvgFetcher` — HTTP fetching with deduplication
  - `SvgSourceResolver` — URL vs. data URI detection
  - `SvgInlineDecoder` — Base64 decoding for data URIs
  - `SvgSanitizer` — DOMPurify integration
  - `SvgMerger` — Attribute and content merging
  - `SvgValidator` — SVG validation
  - `Container` — Dependency injection container
  - `AbstractObserver` — Observable state management
- Removed legacy function exports (`getSvg`, `fetchSvg`,
`mergeSvgContent`, etc.)
- Updated README with quick start, full API reference, and migration
guide for v2 → v3
- Full test coverage for new architecture (SvgStore, all components,
edge cases)

## Checklist

- [x] My branch is named `feature/…` or `bugfix/…`
(feature/migrate-to-observable-patern)
- [x] Commits follow Conventional Commits with correct scope
(`svg-core`)
- [x] Tests are in `tests/` and passing (`npm run test` passes)
- [x] `npm run lint` passes
- [x] Documentation updated (README with migration guide)
- [x] No TypeScript errors
- [x] All existing functionality preserved (different API surface)

## Additional Notes

BREAKING CHANGE: The library API has been completely redesigned. The
old function-based API (`getSvg()`, `fetchSvg()`) is replaced with a
class-based Observable pattern. See the [Migration Guide in
README](packages/svg-core/README.md#-migration-from-v2-to-v3) for
detailed upgrade instructions.

**Why this breaking change?**
The previous implementation wasn't meeting evolving needs around
reactivity and state management. A class-based approach with the
Observer pattern provides:
- ✅ Reactive state updates via `subscribe()`
- ✅ Better testability with dependency injection
- ✅ Cleaner framework integration (React 19 Suspense, Vue reactivity)
- ✅ Future-proof architecture for advanced features

**Impact:**
- 🔴 **Consumers:** Must update all `getSvg()` / `fetchSvg()` calls to
use `new SvgStore()` + `subscribe()` pattern
- 🟢 **svg-react:** Will be updated in follow-up PR to use the new
Observable API
- 🟢 **Storybook:** Will be updated in follow-up PR

**Testing:**
- ✅ All new components have comprehensive test coverage (800+ lines of
new tests)
- ✅ Edge cases covered: network errors, malformed SVG, concurrent
requests
- ✅ Integration tests verify the full pipeline
- ✅ Type safety maintained with TypeScript strict mode

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
refactor: slim RhizaTemplate to a pure data class (#427)

* Initial plan

* refactor: redistribute RhizaTemplate responsibilities to reduce god-class

- Move _expand_paths, _excluded_set, _prepare_snapshot to module-level functions in _git_utils.py
- Add GitContext.update_sparse_checkout, get_head_sha, clone_repository, clone_at_sha instance methods
- Update _merge_with_base to use new GitContext methods and module-level _prepare_snapshot
- Move from_project to _load_template_from_project in sync.py
- Extract clone as _clone_template(template, git_ctx, branch) in sync.py returning (upstream_dir, upstream_sha, resolved_include)
- Inline snapshot logic in sync.py
- Add resolve_include_paths method to RhizaTemplate
- Slim template.py to ~53 statements (data fields, from_config, config, git_url, resolve_include_paths)
- Update all test mocks to point to new locations (GitContext.clone_at_sha, etc.)
- All 491 tests pass with 100% coverage

Co-authored-by: tschm <2046079+tschm@users.noreply.github.com>

* refactor: address code review - simplify logger usage in module-level functions

Remove _logger optional parameter from _expand_paths, _load_template_from_project,
and _clone_template; use module-level loguru logger directly for consistency
with the rest of the codebase.

Co-authored-by: tschm <2046079+tschm@users.noreply.github.com>

perf(js): optimize hot paths across client-side JS modules (#1317)

- form-validation.js: cache compiled RegExp in Map (avoid recompilation per keystroke)
- vnext-app.js: single-pass escHtml (charCodeAt switch vs 4x regex replace),
  AbortController for navigation fetch cancellation
- lookup-helper.js: single-pass escapeHtml (3x fewer string allocations)
- bulk-operations.js: single querySelectorAll pass for checkbox state sync
  (was querying twice + Array.from().filter())
- calculated-fields.js: cache parsed AST per element (avoid JSON.parse per
  recalculation), event delegation instead of per-element listeners
- entity-designer.js: single-pass escHtml

Closes #1312

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Sprint 25: failwith invariant, Dissolve allocation test, keyAreas regression test

- App.fs: None -> failwith 'invariant violated' for DissolveOrder (dead code guard)
- App.fs: expanded comment explaining why transition gate is architecturally wrong
  (staying elements reposition silently; only safe gate is HitMap.Count > 0)
- ArenaAllocationTests.fs: replaced type-shape DissolveOrder test with real
  allocation measurement: 1000 frames of applyDissolve must allocate < 64 B/frame
- ArenaAllocationTests.fs: added keyAreas regression test - verifies keyAreas
  reflects current-frame position for staying (non-entering/exiting) keyed elements
  Fix: El.width must be OUTSIDE El.keyed to be visible to Row layout pass

All 1,565 tests pass.

"Expiring within 90 days" panel in the Overall Compliance summary.

Changes:
- utils.ts: extend computeModuleStatus with Expiring Soon (60-90d);
  add isExpiringSoon() helper for reuse in table components
- types.ts: add expiringSoon count to ComplianceSummary
- api-client.ts: include Expiring Soon in expiring bucket;
  add expiringSoon total to computeComplianceSummary return value;
  extend computeDisclosureSummary threshold from 60 to 90 days
- mock-api-client.ts: match new expiringSoon field in ComplianceSummary
- ComplianceTable.tsx: amber badge for 'Expiring Soon' status
- SummaryTiles.tsx: amber panel showing per-section expiring-soon counts
- Dashboard.tsx: compute permitExpiringSoon; pass counts to SummaryTiles
- PermitsTable.tsx: amber row + expiry date tint for expiring permits
- DisclosureTable.tsx: amber row + expiry date tint; filter updated to 90d
- Tests: add Expiring Soon coverage to utils.test.ts and api-client.test.ts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add id attributes to Learning Records, Disclosures, and Permits
sections and turn the "Expiring within 90 days" panel items into
anchor links so clicking scrolls directly to the relevant table.

Rename "Training" label to "Learning Records" to match the section
heading. Extend LazySection with an optional id prop.

commit.message:
fix: Kling 视频生成统一安全网 — 后台轮询 + SSE 中断保护

根因：Kling 视频任务完全依赖外部 callback 作为唯一完成路径，
没有超时/轮询安全网。callback 不到达时任务永远挂住（前端卡在 10%）。
并发场景下 SSE 中断可能通过 GeneratorExit 取消 Kling API 请求，
加剧问题。

修复：
1. process_kling_video_bg() — 后台轮询安全网（与 Veo 对等）
   - 前 5 分钟：每 10s 检查 DB 状态（等 callback）
   - 5 分钟后：主动查询 Kling API 拿结果
   - 10 分钟超时：标记 failed
   - 幂等保护：DB 已终态则跳过

2. submit_kling_task 自动启动后台轮询
   - 提交成功后 asyncio.create_task(process_kling_video_bg)
   - user_id/project_id 通过参数传入或从 DB 回读
   - 所有调用方自动获得安全网

3. asyncio.shield() 保护 Kling API 请求
   - 防止 SSE 断连导致 GeneratorExit 取消 HTTP 请求
   - 确保请求即使 SSE 中断也能完成

4. Veo 完成时也推送 SSE 事件
   - 与 Kling callback 行为一致
   - 前端可通过 SSE 即时更新而非等 5s 轮询

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(memory): pre-filter source_type during vector search; fix plaud-sync-new bus imports

commit.message:
fix(plaud-sync): fix dedup state double-parse on restart HYD-11

- getState() already JSON.parses stored values, so loadProcessedIds
  was calling JSON.parse() on an already-parsed array
- Array.toString() = 'id1,id2,...' which is invalid JSON → SyntaxError
  → catch block → empty Set → all 185 recordings treated as new on restart
- Fix: check Array.isArray(data) before parsing; pass array directly to setState
- saveProcessedIds now passes array (not pre-serialized string) so setState
  handles encoding once, getState decodes once — no double serialization

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
